moduleInfo.moduleDesc: Video reader for official free STIRR movies, live channels, and fresh HLS playback.
moduleInfo.changelog: 39.0 - Hardens AniLiberty mobile detail pages with string-safe fields, visible error fallback, and a non-empty API info request.
